trade.summary: The Stati Uniti and Francia are major trading partners. Francia exports aircraft (Airbus), luxury goods, pharmaceuticals, and wine to the Stati Uniti. The Stati Uniti exports aerospace, pharmaceuticals, energy, and IT services to Francia. Trade has been periodically disrupted by tariff disputes (Boeing-Airbus WTO saga), but overall volumes are large and growing.
disputes: Stati Uniti tariffs on French wine and cheese (2019-2021)

diplomatic.summary: Francia and the Stati Uniti share the world's oldest alliance, but relations are often turbulent. The ARegno UnitoStati Uniti submarine deal (2021) — which cut Francia out of a lucrative contract with Australia — was a major rupture, described by Francia as a 'betrayal.' Relations recovered under the Biden administration. Under Trump's second term (2025), French concerns about Stati Uniti commitment to NATO and Ucraina have re-emerged, intensifying Macron's push for European strategic autonomy.
recent_incidents: Stati Uniti under Trump questioning NATO commitments (2025)
Francia-Stati Uniti divergence on Ucraina peace terms (2025)

military.summary: The Franco-American alliance is the oldest in Stati Uniti history. Both are NATO's two largest non-Stati Uniti Western military powers. Francia re-joined NATO's integrated military command in 2009. Both share significant intelligence cooperation (SIGINT, counterterrorism). Francia was a key partner in counterterrorism operations in the Sahel and Middle East. Under Trump 2.0, Francia has elevated European defence autonomy discussions.

financial.summary: Massive bilateral investment. The Stati Uniti and Francia are among each other's largest foreign investors. Stati Uniti tech giants (Google, Microsoft, Apple) have major French operations. French multinationals (LVMH, TotalEnergies, BNP Paribas, Airbus) are significant Stati Uniti employers. Financial ties are the deepest of any two non-anglophone bilateral pair.

energy.summary: The Stati Uniti has become a major LNG supplier to Francia, replacing Russian gas post-2022. Francia's nuclear power industry purchases some uranium from Stati Uniti sources. Cooperation in nuclear power technology and clean energy innovation through bilateral agreements.

scientific.summary: One of the world's deepest bilateral science and technology partnerships. Hundreds of joint research programmes at university and government level. CNRS-Stati Uniti collaborations span every scientific domain. French and American researchers co-author extensively. Competition in AI and semiconductor ecosystems coexists with deep collaboration.
